Plot the overdispersion result for one component pair (real read counts)

Source: R/validate-mapping.R
plot_overdispersion.Rd

Each co-occurring sample's observed A-share from real defining-sequence reads, vs its pair read depth, with the binomial fixed-ratio null envelope (+/-2 SE around the pooled ratio). Points tracking the band at all depths = fixed ratio (intragenomic); systematic spread beyond it, especially at high depth where the band is tight, = genuine mixing.

Usage

plot_overdispersion(
  sp,
  model = c("lda", "hdp"),
  comp_a,
  comp_b,
  min_frac = 0.05,
  min_pair_reads = 100,
  top_n = 15,
  owner_frac = 0.5
)

Arguments

sp

A symbayes object with the model fitted.

model

One of "lda" or "hdp".

comp_a, comp_b

Component labels (e.g. "Topic_2", "Topic_9").

min_frac

Presence threshold (default 0.05).

min_pair_reads

Minimum pair reads to include a sample (default 100).

top_n, owner_frac

Defining-sequence assignment controls.

Value

A ggplot2 object.

Examples

if (FALSE)  plot_overdispersion(sp, "lda", "Topic_2", "Topic_9")  # \dontrun{}
